• **Increased Liquidity**: Volatility above average implies higher trading activity and participation from investors, which can attract more buyers and contribute to price appreciation, potentially benefiting those who buy SOL-USD.

Hey everyone,

I’m Sam, a 17yo video editor working mainly with short-form content.

I focus on edits that feel intentional  where the pacing, visuals, and overall style actually support the story and keep people engaged, rather than just filling in cuts.

My approach is a bit more cinematic and detail-oriented, so it works best for creators who want their content to stand out and have a consistent visual identity.

If that aligns with what you’re looking for, you can check out my work here:

Feel free to reach out if you’d like to discuss a project or need input on what style would suit your content.

🚨 We're Hiring | Service Desk Analyst (US Shift)

📍 Location: Chandigarh

🕒 Shift: US Shift

💰 Budget: Up to ₹18 LPA (depending on experience)

Experience: 2-5 Years

We are looking for a customer-focused Service Desk Analyst to provide technical support to global clients.

Key Skills:

✅ Windows troubleshooting

✅ Active Directory

✅ Ticketing tools (ServiceNow/Jira/Freshservice)

✅ Technical support & user management

✅ Excellent communication skills

✅ SLA management

⭐ Healthcare domain exposure (Epic, Cerner, EMR/EHR) is a plus.

Candidates with prior experience supporting international clients are highly preferred.

Interested candidates can share their updated resume.

🚨 We're Hiring | Senior Technology Engineer (US Shift)

📍 Location: Chandigarh

🕒 Shift: US Shift

💰 Budget: Up to ₹18 LPA

Experience: 5-8 Years

We are looking for an experienced Senior Technology Engineer to support global clients across Microsoft 365, Infrastructure, Networking and Cloud environments.

Key Skills:

✅ Microsoft 365 (Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, Intune, Entra ID)

✅ Windows Server & Active Directory

✅ Networking (DNS, DHCP, VPN, VLAN, Firewalls)

✅ VMware / Hyper-V

✅ Azure Fundamentals

✅ Microsoft 365 migration experience

✅ MSP exposure preferred

Strong communication skills and prior experience supporting international clients will be highly preferred.

Interested candidates can share their updated resume immediately.
